incident_details.short_description: Duplicate contacts created by integration job
incident_details.description: Nightly integration created duplicate Contact records when the upstream customer id was missing.

resolution.root_cause: The integration matching rule skipped duplicate detection when upstream customer id was null.
resolution_steps: Updated matching logic to use email and date of birth fallback keys.
Merged duplicate contacts with the data stewardship workflow.
Re-enabled the job and monitored the next run.
